2606.10765.title: ArabiGEE: A Hierarchical Taxonomy for Arabic Grammatical Error Explanation
2606.10765.paper_summary: We introduce ArabiGEE, the first comprehensive Arabic grammatical error explanation (GEE) taxonomy grounded in explicit error types. Unlike existing GEE approaches that treat explanation generation as free-form text, ArabiGEE organizes grammatical explanations through a hierarchical structure spanning orthographic, morphological, syntactic, and lexical dimensions. The taxonomy consists of 27 error types, 140 correction types, and 324 associated explanations. We apply ArabiGEE to manually annotate portions of existing Arabic grammatical error correction corpora and demonstrate how structured grammatical explanations can support automatic evaluation of LLMs on Arabic GEE. Our code and data are publicly available.
2606.10765.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 ArabiGEE，首個基於明確錯誤類型的全面阿拉伯語語法錯誤解釋 (GEE) 分類法。與現有的 GEE 方法將解釋生成視為自由形式文本不同，ArabiGEE 通過一個涵蓋正字法、形態學、句法和詞彙維度的層次結構來組織語法解釋。該分類法由 27 種錯誤類型、140 種修正類型和 324 種相關解釋組成。我們將 ArabiGEE 應用於手動標註現有的阿拉伯語語法錯誤修正語料庫的部分內容，並展示結構化的語法解釋如何支持對阿拉伯語 GEE 的 LLMs 自動評估。我們的代碼和數據是公開可用的。
2606.10765.author: Khaled Elhady et.al.
2606.10765.authors: Khaled Elhady, Omar Kallas, Nizar Habash, Bashar Alhafni
